'''''Dead Reckoning''''' was a modified [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruiser]]. The smuggler [[Rif Taranu]] aided the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] by using it to transport goods for them.

==Sources==

*<!-- 2003-09-30 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''
